[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Lodrel''' commanded the ''[[Lianna Guard]]'', an [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] [[Guardian-class light cruiser|''Guardian''-class light cruiser]] at the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]]. It was destroyed by [[Salla Zend]] in her [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]], the [[Rimrunner (Gymsnor-4)|''Rimrunner'']].
